# We Help Automate (WeHA)

> We Help Automate (WeHA) is an AI automation studio that turns manual workflows
> into systems that run themselves. Built on the tools you already use, delivered
> in days not months, and fully owned by you with no lock-in. We serve businesses
> of any kind, anywhere.

## About

- Founded by two operators: an AI systems builder and a COO.
- Practical and vendor neutral. We build on the tools you already run, not on
  tools we want to sell you.
- Every system is documented and handed over, so your team stays in control.

## Services

- Deterministic AI Solutions: rule based, reliable automations across n8n, Make,
  Zapier, and Google Workspace.
- Autonomous Agentic AI Solutions: custom AI agents that read, decide, and
  complete multi step tasks end to end.
- AI Transformation Consulting: advisory only. A clear roadmap for where AI fits
  and what to automate first.

## Approach

- Build on the tools you already use, with no forced migrations.
- Keep a human in the loop wherever judgment matters.
- Hand over full ownership and documentation. No black boxes, no lock-in.
